summary: R5028B - Start-up image on application launch
description:
**Graphical User Interface**

**R5028 Requirement:** Check that the following content information is created in the specified format and is displayed/played back correctly.
- Still image icons
- Title names
- Background image
- BGM (optional)
- Start-up image
- Save data default icon (optional)

Also ensure that content information is pursuant to the following
- If still image icons and title names support multilingual switching, content information correctly switches to the supported language

steps.action:
1. Select the "Application" on the home screen

**Notes:**
- A start-up image other than a black image is strongly recommended.
- Please note that R5019 is also applicable in displaying the start-up image.
- After the application is finished displaying the start-up image, if a blacked out screen is displayed before a screen that the application displays, it must be for less than 30 seconds according to R5019.
steps.result: The start-up image continues to be displayed until the application displays its screen.
